overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a dystopian urban environment. The player moves from an enclosed plaza with large digital billboards through narrow industrial passages and onto neon-lit city streets with towering skyscrapers visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed plaza with large digital billboard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through an enclosed urban plaza surrounded by industrial structures and metal walkways

entered.detail: massive illuminated screen displaying Japanese text and graphics on the far wall of the plaza
yellow metal staircase leading to upper walkway levels
metal catwalks and platforms connecting building structures above ground level
industrial building facade with yellow safety railings on multiple levels

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a semi-enclosed urban plaza at night, dominated by a large digital billboard displaying Japanese characters. The environment features industrial architecture with metal stairs, overhead walkways, and yellow-railed structures. The ground is concrete with scattered debris, and the area is devoid of people.

events.description: moves from open plaza into narrow industrial corridor between concrete buildings

agents.ego_description: proceeding through a narrow passage flanked by industrial buildings and overhead structures

entered.detail: metal bridge connecting buildings overhead with yellow support beams
tall concrete wall with graffiti and industrial piping
chain-link fence running along the right side of the passage
tall street lamp illuminating the narrow corridor

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow industrial corridor between buildings. Overhead walkways connect the structures, and the path is flanked by concrete walls and metal fencing. The lighting becomes more artificial and enclosed as the plaza with the billboard disappears behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: major city intersection with towering skyscrapers

events.description: exits narrow passage into open city street with tall skyscrapers visible through haze
crosses the street at a marked crosswalk while a pedestrian crosses ahead

agents.ego_description: emerging from the narrow passage and crossing the wide city street toward the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: massive illuminated skyscraper towering above the street with red lights near the top
marked pedestrian crossing with white stripes on the asphalt
traffic signal pole with red light illuminated
pink and blue neon signs on distant buildings
red and yellow trash containers on the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: The environment opens dramatically into a wide city intersection with towering skyscrapers visible through the night haze. The camera crosses the street at a crosswalk, passing trash bins and traffic lights. A pedestrian crosses ahead, and neon signs illuminate the distant buildings while the industrial passage falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with building facades and vertical digital billboards

events.description: turns left onto the sidewalk and continues walking alongside the building

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk next to a building with large digital advertisements

entered.detail: concrete building wall with weathered texture and industrial details
tall vertical screen displaying red and white graphics on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the sidewalk alongside a concrete building featuring vertical digital billboards. The street continues alongside with occasional vehicles passing by. The tall skyscrapers remain visible in the distance to the left as the camera moves steadily forward along the urban thoroughfare.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a desolate industrial plaza into the neon-lit expanse of a futuristic city center. It begins in a semi-enclosed urban plaza dominated by a large digital billboard and yellow-railed metal structures, moving across concrete ground scattered with debris. As the camera pushes forward, the open plaza gives way to a narrow industrial corridor flanked by concrete walls and overhead walkways, creating a more enclosed and artificial atmosphere. The scene then opens dramatically into a wide city intersection where the industrial passage falls behind, revealing towering skyscrapers through a nighttime haze as the camera crosses a street past traffic lights and a lone pedestrian. Finally, the movement settles into a steady pace along a sidewalk lined with vertical digital billboards and passing vehicles, with the distant skyline remaining visible to the left.
